title: PhaseWrap: Negative Results for Phase-Wrap Positional Scoring and Hardware-Readout Audit Tooling
description: Open-source negative-results evidence repository for PhaseWrap, including a phase-wrap positional scoring rule, deterministic validation packets, score-theory limits, retrieval-benchmark failure modes, method-nonspecific support-routing repairs, a machine-verifiable Stage 4 hardware sweep, provider-aware IBM Runtime and Amazon Braket artifacts, and Stage216-218 full IBM Fez 4096-shot hardware-readout comparison. The release does not claim broad quantum advantage, production transformer superiority, full transformer-scale validation, RoPE replacement, or general cross-backend robustness.
